summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Platform - Iteration 6. All features working correctly: Hero Section with platform name (نَسَّق/NASSAQ), Traction Section with 4 stats cards (+200 schools, +50,000 students, +100,000 parents, +3,000 teachers), 24/7 Support Badge, Language Toggle (RTL/LTR), Login functionality, and all backend APIs.
passed_tests: Hero Section displays platform name 'نَسَّق' in Arabic (RTL mode)
Hero Section displays platform name 'NASSAQ' in English (LTR mode)
Traction Section shows 4 stats cards: Schools (+200), Students (+50,000), Parents (+100,000), Teachers (+3,000)
24/7 Support Badge visible in Arabic (دعم فني متواصل 24/7)
24/7 Technical Support Badge visible in English
API: /api/auth/login - returns token and user data
API: /api/dashboard/stats - returns all required fields (total_schools, total_students, total_teachers, etc.)
API: /api/dashboard/stats - values align with traction metrics (200+ schools, 50000+ students, 3000+ teachers)
API: /api/seed/demo-data - endpoint works and returns counts
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded with 200 schools, 50000 students, 3061 teachers, 9440 classes, 904 subjects
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Hero Section shows platform name under logo (نَسَّق in Arabic, NASSAQ in English), 2) Traction Section displays 4 stats cards with correct numbers, 3) 24/7 Support Badge is visible, 4) Language toggle works correctly, 5) Login works with provided credentials, 6) /api/seed/demo-data endpoint creates demo data, 7) /api/dashboard/stats returns live statistics. Dashboard shows: 200 schools, 50000 students, 3061 teachers, 137 active schools, 6 pending requests.
